# scenario: Tare flow (T) on an MC-100SCCM-D — response is a post-tare
# data frame matching the shape in dataframe_format_mc.txt:
#   Unit_ID Abs_Press Flow_Temp Vol_Flow Mass_Flow Setpoint Gas_Label
# Mass_Flow should zero after a successful tare; synthetic fixture —
# hardware-correctable per design §16.4.
